claim: Cloud LLM APIs have gutted free/cheap plans, forcing developers to pay expensive per-token pricing for continuous use
actionable: For active development, evaluate local LLM solutions (Ollama, Llama.cpp) to eliminate recurring API costs
source_title: The Best Local Agentic Coding Workflow (Complete Guide)

claim: Local LLMs can run in agent mode within VS Code, calling CLI tools and file operations without cloud dependencies
actionable: Set up Ollama + VS Code extension to enable local agent mode for autonomous CLI execution and code modification
source_title: The Best Local Agentic Coding Workflow (Complete Guide)

claim: Local models provide responsive code autocomplete competitive with cloud solutions, with zero API latency
actionable: Configure local LLM autocomplete extension in VS Code for instant, privacy-preserving suggestions
source_title: The Best Local Agentic Coding Workflow (Complete Guide)

claim: Local LLM setups guarantee code/data privacy—no external transmission or cloud logging
actionable: For proprietary codebases, deploy local LLM to avoid exposing code to cloud APIs
source_title: The Best Local Agentic Coding Workflow (Complete Guide)

claim: GPU memory overflow to system RAM significantly degrades LLM inference speed; allocation planning is critical
actionable: Check GPU memory capacity before deployment; allocate only what fits to avoid RAM overflow performance penalties
source_title: The Best Local Agentic Coding Workflow (Complete Guide)

claim: Learning agentic system concepts (prompting, tool bindings, state) rather than configuration steps ensures durability across framework changes
actionable: When learning agentic setups, prioritize understanding architectural patterns over specific tool commands
source_title: The Best Local Agentic Coding Workflow (Complete Guide)
